Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment:

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent decree" is granted.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
